visual_attributes.morphology: large-scale electric discharge with varied visual shapes
distinctive_features: clusters of small, decameter scale balls of ionization
visual_attributes.size_and_scale: spans 50 to 90 km in altitude, horizontally displaced up to 50 km
visual_attributes.structural_arrangement: clusters of ionization balls moving downward and upward

functional_attributes.primary_function: electrical discharge in the upper atmosphere

domain_specific_functional.ELECTRICAL_FIELD_RESPONSE: occurs in response to electric fields from lightning

relationships.description: Sprites are triggered by positive lightning discharges.
Sprites are related to other upper-atmospheric phenomena like blue jets.
Sprites are sometimes mistaken for ELVES due to visual similarity.

contextual_attributes.geographic_range: observed globally over large thunderstorm systems
contextual_attributes.cultural_significance: named after mythological air spirits due to elusive nature
